text: The cat sat on the mat and watched the birds flying outside the window.
input_text: Le chat etait assis sur le tapis et regardait les oiseaux voler dehors.

text: The government announced new tax reforms that will reduce income tax by 15% for all citizens starting next year.
input_text: The government announced new tax reforms that will affect income tax rates starting next year.

text: A small, round fruit with a smooth red or green skin and crisp white flesh, typically eaten fresh or used in cooking and baking.
input_text: Define the word 'apple' as used in: She picked a fresh apple from the tree in the garden.

text: The researcher presented the findings of the comprehensive study at the annual international medical conference in Geneva.
input_text: Der Forscher prasentierte die Ergebnisse der Studie auf der jahrlichen Konferenz.

text: Students at the university protested against the proposed budget cuts to the science department.
input_text: Students at the university demonstrated in opposition to the suggested reductions in funding for the science department.

text: A sturdy piece of furniture with a flat top surface supported by legs, commonly used for dining, working, or placing objects on.
input_text: Define the word 'table' as used in: Please set the table for dinner tonight.

text: The company reported record quarterly profits of $2.3 billion, a 20% increase over the same period last year.
input_text: La empresa informo ganancias trimestrales record, un aumento sobre el mismo periodo del ano pasado.

text: Heavy rainfall throughout the week caused widespread flooding in several low-lying areas of the region.
input_text: Persistent rain over the course of the week led to significant flooding in multiple low-lying parts of the region.

text: The act of moving through water by using the arms and legs, typically as a form of exercise, recreation, or competitive sport performed in pools or natural bodies of water.
input_text: Define the word 'swimming' as used in: She goes swimming at the local pool every morning before work.

text: The new policy requires all employees to work from the office at least three days per week, effective immediately, with penalties for non-compliance.
input_text: The new policy encourages employees to work from the office more frequently, with the changes taking effect next month.
